rootCause: After the chip contrast fixes, Process cards correctly rendered in inverted light mode, but ProgressBar.svelte still used fixed colors (light-green fill on light card) and was not wired to the process inverted state, so the active fill visually blended into the background.
resolution: Added an inverted prop to ProgressBar, passed Process.svelte inversion state through to it, and mapped inverted mode to a darker fill/light track treatment with regression coverage for both ProgressBar and Process in-progress contrast behavior.
